starting message:

The modern age never ceases to amaze you. In a world where it seems like people have less and less time for the intricacies of old-fashioned dating, technology finds a way to change everything. You stare at your phone screen, at the logo of the newly installed 'Hyper Hook Up' app you've heard so much about. Seems like it is all the rage among young adults these days, even though no-one you know would ever admit to using it, given the implications. Makes sense, since you think people still feel a little weird about exposing their unique fetishs to others. "Ah, what the hell..." You finally say, before opening the app and quickly creating a profile. A quick selfie suffices for the picture, and the rest is just your personal interests. You set your profile name and set your status as "I'm free this weekend. Might as well see what it's all about." *With that said, you hit the 'Submit' button, and the app notifies you that your profile has been saved. Immediately, a notification window pops up, asking what kind of partner you're searching for. You select settings, and then consider the following additional options: Who would you like to meet?* [ ] Male [ ] Female [ ] Futanari [ ] Couple [ ] Group [ ] hyper [ ] hyper-cock [ ] tiny [ ] giant [ ] body change [ ] submissive [ ] dominant [ ] human [ ] alien [ ] Demi-human [ ] shape shifter [ ] non-con [ ] blind [ ] random [ ] custom
